CloudProbe 云服务器探针系统

技术方案文档

版本: v1.0 | 日期: 2026-06-27 | 状态: 草案

目录

  • 1. 技术选型
  • 2. 系统架构
  • 3. 数据库设计
  • 4. API 接口设计
  • 5. 通信协议设计
  • 6. 安全设计
  • 7. 部署方案
  • 8. 项目目录结构
  • 9. 关键模块设计

1. 技术选型

1.1 后端技术栈

层级技术版本选型理由
编程语言 Go 1.22+ 高性能、低资源占用、跨平台编译、并发模型优秀，探针类项目首选
Web框架 Gin v1.9+ 轻量、高性能、生态成熟、中间件机制完善
gRPC google.golang.org/grpc v1.60+ 国外部署方案主通信协议，高效二进制传输
WebSocket gorilla/websocket v1.5+ 国内部署方案备选，浏览器兼容性好
数据库 PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB 15+ / 2.13+ 关系数据+时序数据一体化，百台规模性能优秀
缓存 Redis 7+ 会话缓存、实时状态、分布式锁、消息队列
ORM GORM v2.0+ 生态完善、迁移支持、对PostgreSQL友好
配置 Viper v1.18+ 支持多格式、环境变量、热重载
日志 Zap v1.26+ 高性能结构化日志，支持JSON输出
任务调度 robfig/cron v3+ 定时备份、定期清理、SSL检测等

1.2 前端技术栈

层级技术版本选型理由
框架 Vue 3 3.4+ 组合式API、性能优秀、生态丰富
语言 TypeScript 5.3+ 类型安全、IDE支持好、大型项目维护性强
构建工具 Vite 5.0+ 极速冷启动、HMR、打包优化
UI组件库 Element Plus 2.5+ 组件丰富、主题定制方便、文档完善
状态管理 Pinia 2.1+ Vue官方推荐、TypeScript友好、Devtools支持
路由 Vue Router 4.2+ 官方路由、导航守卫、懒加载
HTTP客户端 Axios 1.6+ 拦截器、请求取消、自动JSON解析
图表 ECharts 5.4+ 功能全面、性能优秀、主题可定制
终端 xterm.js 5.3+ WebSSH终端实现，功能完善、可定制主题
CSS Tailwind CSS 3.4+ 实用优先、响应式、暗色主题支持好

1.3 基础设施

组件技术说明
容器化Docker + Docker Compose一键部署，环境隔离
反向代理Nginx / CaddySSL终止、静态资源、反向代理
进程管理systemdAgent服务自启动、守护
版本控制Git + GitHub + Gitee双仓库同步推送

2. 系统架构

2.1 整体架构

flowchart TB
    subgraph Client["客户端层"]
        Web["Web Dashboard
Vue3 SPA"]
        Mobile["移动端浏览器"]
        APICli["API客户端"]
    end

    subgraph Gateway["网关层"]
        Nginx["Nginx/Caddy
SSL + 反代"]
    end

    subgraph DashboardService["Dashboard 服务层"]
        REST["REST API
Gin"]
        GRPC["gRPC Server
国外方案"]
        WSS["WebSocket
国内方案"]
        Auth["认证中间件
JWT + RBAC"]
    end

    subgraph Core["核心模块"]
        AgentMgr["Agent管理"]
        Monitor["监控引擎"]
        AlertEng["告警引擎"]
        NotifyGW["通知网关"]
        SSHMGR["SSH管理器"]
        APIMod["API模块"]
    end

    subgraph Data["数据层"]
        PG[(PostgreSQL
业务数据)]
        TS[(TimescaleDB
时序数据)]
        RD[(Redis
缓存 + 会话)]
    end

    subgraph Agents["Agent 集群"]
        A1["Agent-1
Linux"]
        A2["Agent-2
Windows"]
        AN["Agent-N"]
    end

    subgraph Notify["通知渠道"]
        WX["微信"]
        QQ["QQ"]
        EM["邮件"]
        FS["飞书"]
        TG["Telegram"]
    end

    subgraph XUI["3x-ui 代理服务"]
        XUIApi["3x-ui REST API
Gin"]
        XCore["Xray-core"]
    end

    Web --> Nginx
    Mobile --> Nginx
    APICli --> Nginx
    Nginx --> REST
    Nginx --> GRPC
    Nginx --> WSS

    REST --> Auth
    Auth --> Core

    AgentMgr --> A1 & A2 & AN
    A1 & A2 & AN --> GRPC
    A1 & A2 & AN --> WSS

    Monitor --> PG
    Monitor --> TS
    AlertEng --> NotifyGW
    NotifyGW --> WX & QQ & EM & FS & TG
    SSHMGR --> A1 & A2 & AN
    APIMod --> REST

    Core --> PG
    Core --> TS
    Core --> RD

    APIMod -->|"Bearer Token"| XUIApi
    XUIApi --> XCore

2.2 部署架构（双方案）

方案A：国内部署

flowchart LR
    A["Agent
国内服务器"] -->|"HTTPS + WSS
端口443/自定义"| B["Nginx
SSL终止"]
    B --> C["Dashboard
Go + Gin"]
    C --> D[(PostgreSQL)]
    C --> E[(Redis)]
  • Agent通过 WebSocket over HTTPS 与Dashboard通信
  • 避免gRPC直连被干扰的问题
  • 支持CDN前置（仅静态资源）
  • Agent安装脚本从Gitee/国内镜像拉取

方案B：国外部署

flowchart LR
    A["Agent
海外服务器"] -->|"gRPC + TLS
端口50051"| B["Dashboard
Go + gRPC"]
    B --> C[(PostgreSQL)]
    B --> D[(Redis)]
    E["Web浏览器"] -->|"HTTPS
端口443"| F["Nginx
反代"]
    F --> B
  • Agent通过 gRPC over TLS 与Dashboard通信
  • HTTP/2多路复用，性能更优
  • Web访问通过Nginx反向代理到Dashboard
  • Agent安装脚本从GitHub拉取

3. 数据库设计

3.1 数据库选型策略

采用 PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB 组合：

  • PostgreSQL：存储业务数据（用户、服务器配置、告警规则、通知渠道等）
  • TimescaleDB：作为PostgreSQL的扩展，专门存储时序监控数据（CPU、内存、网络等）

3.2 核心表结构

用户与权限

-- users 用户表
CREATE TABLE users (
    id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    username    VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    password    VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,  -- bcrypt hash
    email       VARCHAR(100),
    role        VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'viewer',  -- admin / viewer
    status      VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'active',  -- active / disabled
    created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- sessions 会话表 (Redis 为主，DB备份)
CREATE TABLE sessions (
    id          VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id     INT REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    token       VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    expires_at  TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

服务器与Agent

-- servers 服务器表
CREATE TABLE servers (
    id              SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    name            VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    group_id        INT REFERENCES server_groups(id),
    os_type         VARCHAR(20),  -- linux / windows
    os_version      VARCHAR(100),
    cpu_model       VARCHAR(200),
    cpu_cores       INT,
    memory_total    BIGINT,  -- MB
    disk_total      BIGINT,  -- GB
    location        VARCHAR(100),  -- GeoIP结果
    ip_public       VARCHAR(50),
    ip_private      VARCHAR(50),
    ssh_port        INT DEFAULT 22,
    ssh_user        VARCHAR(50),
    status          VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'offline',  -- online / offline
    agent_version   VARCHAR(20),
    agent_token     VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE,  -- Agent注册Token
    last_seen_at    TIMESTAMPTZ,
    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- server_groups 服务器分组表
CREATE TABLE server_groups (
    id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    name        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    parent_id   INT REFERENCES server_groups(id),  -- 一层嵌套
    sort_order  INT DEFAULT 0,
    created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- server_tags 服务器标签表
CREATE TABLE server_tags (
    id      SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    server_id INT REFERENCES servers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    tag     VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL
);

-- server_bills 服务器账单表
CREATE TABLE server_bills (
    id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    server_id   INT REFERENCES servers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    price       DECIMAL(10,2),
    currency    VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'CNY',
    cycle       VARCHAR(20),  -- monthly / yearly
    renew_date  DATE,
    provider    VARCHAR(100),
    created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

时序数据表（TimescaleDB Hypertable）

-- metrics 监控指标表（时序）
CREATE TABLE metrics (
    time        TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    server_id   INT NOT NULL,
    metric_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,  -- cpu / memory / disk / network / load
    value       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    labels      JSONB  -- 额外标签，如 disk_path, net_interface
);

-- 转换为Hypertable，按时间分区，保留90天
SELECT create_hypertable('metrics', 'time', chunk_time_interval => INTERVAL '1 day');
SELECT add_retention_policy('metrics', drop_after => INTERVAL '90 days');

-- network_traffic 网络流量表（时序）
CREATE TABLE network_traffic (
    time            TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    server_id       INT NOT NULL,
    interface       VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    bytes_sent      BIGINT,
    bytes_recv      BIGINT,
    packets_sent    BIGINT,
    packets_recv    BIGINT
);
SELECT create_hypertable('network_traffic', 'time', chunk_time_interval => INTERVAL '1 day');
SELECT add_retention_policy('network_traffic', drop_after => INTERVAL '90 days');

告警与通知

-- alert_rules 告警规则表
CREATE TABLE alert_rules (
    id              SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    name            VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    rule_type       VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,  -- offline / cpu / memory / disk / traffic / load / port / ssl / container
    target_type     VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,  -- server / group / all
    target_id       INT,  -- server_id or group_id
    threshold       DOUBLE PRECISION,  -- 阈值
    duration        INT DEFAULT 60,  -- 持续秒数触发
    enabled         BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_by      INT REFERENCES users(id),
    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- alert_notifications 告警通知配置表
CREATE TABLE alert_notifications (
    id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    rule_id     INT REFERENCES alert_rules(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    channel     VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,  -- wechat / qq / email / feishu / telegram
    config      JSONB NOT NULL,  -- 渠道特定配置
    is_upgrade  BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,  -- FALSE=首次通知, TRUE=升级通知
    created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- alerts 告警记录表
CREATE TABLE alerts (
    id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    rule_id     INT REFERENCES alert_rules(id),
    server_id   INT REFERENCES servers(id),
    status      VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'firing',  -- firing / resolved
    message     TEXT,
    started_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    duration_sec INT  -- 异常持续时间（秒）
);

-- notification_logs 通知发送日志
CREATE TABLE notification_logs (
    id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    alert_id    INT REFERENCES alerts(id),
    channel     VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    recipient   VARCHAR(100),
    status      VARCHAR(20),  -- sent / failed
    error_msg   TEXT,
    sent_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

通知渠道配置

-- notification_channels 全局通知渠道配置表
CREATE TABLE notification_channels (
    id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    name        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    channel     VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,  -- wechat / qq / email / feishu / telegram
    enabled     BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    config      JSONB NOT NULL,
    created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- config 示例 (JSONB):
-- wechat:   {"provider": "serverchan", "key": "SCTxxxxx"}
-- qq:       {"type": "gocqhttp", "base_url": "http://127.0.0.1:5700", "group_id": "123456"}
-- email:    {"smtp_host": "smtp.qq.com", "smtp_port": 587, "username": "xxx", "password": "xxx", "to": ["a@b.com"]}
-- feishu:   {"webhook": "https://open.feishu.cn/...", "secret": "xxx"}
-- telegram: {"bot_token": "xxx", "chat_id": "-100xxx"}

4. API 接口设计

4.1 认证机制

  • Web登录：JWT Token，有效期24小时，存储于HttpOnly Cookie
  • API调用：API Key，通过 Authorization: Bearer <api_key> 头部传递
  • Token刷新：JWT支持Refresh Token机制

4.2 核心API列表

方法路径说明权限
认证
POST/api/v1/auth/login用户登录公开
POST/api/v1/auth/logout退出登录已登录
POST/api/v1/auth/refresh刷新Token已登录
服务器
GET/api/v1/servers获取服务器列表Viewer+
GET/api/v1/servers/:id获取服务器详情Viewer+
POST/api/v1/servers添加服务器Admin
PUT/api/v1/servers/:id更新服务器信息Admin
DELETE/api/v1/servers/:id删除服务器Admin
GET/api/v1/servers/:id/metrics获取服务器监控数据Viewer+
GET/api/v1/servers/:id/install获取Agent安装命令Admin
监控数据
GET/api/v1/metrics/realtime获取所有服务器实时状态Viewer+
GET/api/v1/metrics/history获取历史趋势数据（支持时间范围）Viewer+
告警
GET/api/v1/alerts获取告警列表Viewer+
POST/api/v1/alerts/rules创建告警规则Admin
PUT/api/v1/alerts/rules/:id更新告警规则Admin
DELETE/api/v1/alerts/rules/:id删除告警规则Admin
通知
GET/api/v1/notifications/channels获取通知渠道列表Admin
POST/api/v1/notifications/channels添加通知渠道Admin
POST/api/v1/notifications/test发送测试消息Admin
WebSSH
GET/api/v1/ssh/:server_id/connect建立SSH WebSocket连接Admin
系统
GET/api/v1/system/info获取系统信息Viewer+
POST/api/v1/system/backup手动触发备份Admin
GET/api/v1/system/settings获取系统配置Admin
PUT/api/v1/system/settings更新系统配置Admin
代理管理（3x-ui代理）
GET/api/v1/proxy/status获取3x-ui连接状态Admin
POST/api/v1/proxy/config配置3x-ui面板地址和TokenAdmin
POST/api/v1/proxy/test测试3x-ui连接Admin
GET/api/v1/proxy/inbounds获取入站列表（代理自3x-ui）Admin
GET/api/v1/proxy/clients获取客户端列表（代理自3x-ui）Admin
GET/api/v1/proxy/nodes获取节点列表及状态（代理自3x-ui）Admin
GET/api/v1/proxy/xray/status获取Xray运行状态（代理自3x-ui）Admin
POST/api/v1/proxy/inbounds/add添加入站（代理自3x-ui）Admin
POST/api/v1/proxy/inbounds/update/:id更新入站（代理自3x-ui）Admin
POST/api/v1/proxy/inbounds/del/:id删除入站（代理自3x-ui）Admin

4.3 监控数据查询接口示例

GET /api/v1/servers/123/metrics?type=cpu,memory&from=2026-06-20T00:00:00Z&to=2026-06-27T00:00:00Z&interval=1h

Response:
{
  "server_id": 123,
  "time_range": { "from": "...", "to": "..." },
  "data": {
    "cpu": [
      { "time": "2026-06-20T00:00:00Z", "value": 45.2 },
      { "time": "2026-06-20T01:00:00Z", "value": 38.5 }
    ],
    "memory": [
      { "time": "2026-06-20T00:00:00Z", "value": 62.1 },
      { "time": "2026-06-20T01:00:00Z", "value": 61.8 }
    ]
  }
}

5. 通信协议设计

5.1 国外方案：gRPC over TLS

协议定义 (.proto)

syntax = "proto3";
package cloudprobe;

service AgentService {
  // Agent 上报监控数据（双向流）
  rpc ReportMetrics(stream MetricsRequest) returns (stream CommandResponse);
  
  // Agent 注册
  rpc RegisterAgent(RegisterRequest) returns (RegisterResponse);
  
  // 心跳检测
  rpc Heartbeat(HeartbeatRequest) returns (HeartbeatResponse);
}

message MetricsRequest {
  string agent_token = 1;
  int64 timestamp = 2;
  CpuInfo cpu = 3;
  MemoryInfo memory = 4;
  repeated DiskInfo disks = 5;
  NetworkInfo network = 6;
  SystemInfo system = 7;
}

message CpuInfo {
  double usage_percent = 1;
  int32 cores = 2;
  string model = 3;
}

message MemoryInfo {
  uint64 total_mb = 1;
  uint64 used_mb = 2;
  double usage_percent = 3;
}

message DiskInfo {
  string path = 1;
  uint64 total_gb = 2;
  uint64 used_gb = 3;
  double usage_percent = 4;
}

message NetworkInfo {
  uint64 bytes_sent = 1;
  uint64 bytes_recv = 2;
  uint64 packets_sent = 3;
  uint64 packets_recv = 4;
}

message SystemInfo {
  string os_type = 1;
  string os_version = 2;
  string hostname = 3;
  string ip_public = 4;
  string ip_private = 5;
  double load_avg_1 = 6;
  double load_avg_5 = 7;
  double load_avg_15 = 8;
  uint32 uptime_seconds = 9;
}

message CommandResponse {
  string command_id = 1;
  string action = 2;  // "upgrade", "config_update", "restart"
  bytes payload = 3;
}

5.2 国内方案：WebSocket over HTTPS

// 连接建立
wss://dashboard.example.com/ws/agent?token=<agent_token>

// Agent 上报消息 (JSON)
{
  "type": "metrics",
  "timestamp": 1719446400,
  "data": {
    "cpu": { "usage_percent": 45.2, "cores": 4 },
    "memory": { "total_mb": 8192, "used_mb": 4096, "usage_percent": 50.0 },
    "disks": [{ "path": "/", "total_gb": 100, "used_gb": 60, "usage_percent": 60.0 }],
    "network": { "bytes_sent": 12345678, "bytes_recv": 87654321 },
    "system": { "os_type": "linux", "hostname": "server-01", "load_avg_1": 0.5 }
  }
}

// Dashboard 下发命令 (JSON)
{
  "type": "command",
  "command_id": "cmd-001",
  "action": "upgrade",
  "payload": { "version": "v1.1.0", "download_url": "..." }
}

5.3 WebSSH 通信

// 建立 WebSocket 连接
wss://dashboard.example.com/ws/ssh?server_id=123&token=<jwt_token>

// 前端 → 后端: 发送终端输入
{
  "type": "input",
  "data": "ls -la\n"
}

// 后端 → 前端: 发送终端输出
{
  "type": "output",
  "data": "total 128\ndrwxr-xr-x  5 root root 4096 Jun 27 00:00 .\n..."
}

// 后端 → 前端: 调整终端大小
{
  "type": "resize",
  "cols": 120,
  "rows": 30
}

6. 安全设计

6.1 通信安全

  • TLS 1.3：所有对外通信强制TLS加密
  • 证书管理：支持Let's Encrypt自动证书，或自定义证书
  • Agent认证：每个Agent分配唯一Token，首次连接时验证
  • Token轮换：Agent Token支持定期轮换

6.2 认证与授权

  • 密码存储：bcrypt哈希，cost factor 12
  • JWT安全：RS256签名，短有效期（Access Token 15分钟，Refresh Token 7天）
  • RBAC权限：Admin（全权限）/ Viewer（只读）
  • 会话管理：支持强制登出、查看活跃会话
  • API Key：独立生成的随机字符串，支持撤销

6.3 WebSSH安全

  • 审计日志：记录所有SSH连接时间、执行命令、IP地址
  • 危险命令拦截：rm -rf /、mkfs. 等命令二次确认
  • 会话超时：30分钟无操作自动断开
  • 仅限Admin：Viewer角色无法发起SSH连接

6.4 数据安全

  • 敏感信息脱敏：IP地址部分遮挡（如 192.168.x.x）
  • 数据库备份加密：备份文件GPG加密后再发送邮件
  • SQL注入防护：使用参数化查询（GORM自动处理）
  • XSS防护：前端Vue自动转义，后端输出过滤

7. 部署方案

7.1 Docker Compose 部署

# docker-compose.yml (Dashboard)
version: "3.8"
services:
  dashboard:
    image: cloudprobe/dashboard:latest
    container_name: cloudprobe-dashboard
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"      # Web/API
      - "50051:50051"    # gRPC (国外方案)
    environment:
      - CP_DATABASE_URL=postgres://cpuser:cppass@postgres:5432/cloudprobe
      - CP_REDIS_URL=redis:6379
      - CP_MODE=foreign   # domestic / foreign
    volumes:
      - ./data:/app/data
      - ./config:/app/config
    depends_on:
      - postgres
      - redis

  postgres:
    image: timescale/timescaledb:latest-pg15
    container_name: cloudprobe-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: cpuser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: cppass
      POSTGRES_DB: cloudprobe
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: cloudprobe-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    container_name: cloudprobe-nginx
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
      - ./ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl
    depends_on:
      - dashboard

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:

7.2 Agent 一键安装脚本

#!/bin/bash
# install-agent.sh (Linux)
set -e

DASHBOARD_URL="${1:-https://dashboard.example.com}"
AGENT_TOKEN="${2:-}"
MODE="${3:-foreign}"  # domestic / foreign

# 判断国内/国外，选择下载源
if [ "$MODE" = "domestic" ]; then
    DOWNLOAD_URL="https://gitee.com/yourname/cloudprobe/releases/latest"
else
    DOWNLOAD_URL="https://github.com/yourname/cloudprobe/releases/latest"
fi

# 下载Agent
ARCH=$(uname -m)
OS=$(uname -s | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
curl -fsSL "${DOWNLOAD_URL}/download/cloudprobe-agent-${OS}-${ARCH}" -o /usr/local/bin/cloudprobe-agent
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/cloudprobe-agent

# 创建配置
cat > /etc/cloudprobe/agent.yml < /etc/systemd/system/cloudprobe-agent.service <

7.3 Nginx 配置示例

# nginx.conf (国外方案)
server {
    listen 443 ssl http2;
    server_name dashboard.example.com;

    ssl_certificate /etc/nginx/ssl/cert.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/nginx/ssl/key.pem;

    # 前端静态资源
    location / {
        root /var/www/cloudprobe;
        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;
    }

    # API 代理
    location /api/ {
        proxy_pass http://dashboard:8000;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
    }

    # gRPC 代理
    location /cloudprobe.AgentService/ {
        grpc_pass grpc://dashboard:50051;
        grpc_set_header Host $host;
    }

    # WebSocket 代理（国内方案）
    location /ws/ {
        proxy_pass http://dashboard:8000;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
    }
}

8. 项目目录结构

8.1 后端 (cloudprobe-dashboard)

cloudprobe-dashboard/ ├── cmd/ # 入口程序 │ └── dashboard/ # Dashboard主程序 │ └── main.go ├── internal/ # 内部包 │ ├── api/ # HTTP API处理器 │ │ ├── handler.go │ │ ├── server.go │ │ └── middleware/ │ ├── grpc/ # gRPC服务 │ │ ├── server.go │ │ └── agent_service.go │ ├── ws/ # WebSocket服务 │ │ ├── server.go │ │ ├── agent_handler.go │ │ └── ssh_handler.go │ ├── service/ # 业务逻辑层 │ │ ├── agent_service.go │ │ ├── monitor_service.go │ │ ├── alert_service.go │ │ ├── notify_service.go │ │ └── ssh_service.go │ ├── repository/ # 数据访问层 │ │ ├── user_repo.go │ │ ├── server_repo.go │ │ ├── metric_repo.go │ │ └── alert_repo.go │ ├── model/ # 数据模型 │ │ ├── user.go │ │ ├── server.go │ │ ├── metric.go │ │ └── alert.go │ ├── notify/ # 通知渠道适配器 │ │ ├── notifier.go │ │ ├── wechat.go │ │ ├── qq.go │ │ ├── email.go │ │ ├── feishu.go │ │ └── telegram.go │ ├── config/ # 配置管理 │ │ └── config.go │ ├── auth/ # 认证授权 │ │ ├── jwt.go │ │ └── rbac.go │ ├── task/ # 定时任务 │ │ ├── backup_task.go │ │ ├── cleanup_task.go │ │ └── ssl_check_task.go │ └── pkg/ # 通用工具包 │ ├── crypto.go │ ├── iputil.go │ └── geoip.go ├── proto/ # Protocol Buffers定义 │ └── agent.proto ├── config/ # 配置文件模板 │ └── config.yml ├── scripts/ # 脚本 │ ├── install-agent.sh │ └── install-agent.ps1 ├── deploy/ # 部署文件 │ ├── docker-compose.yml │ └── nginx.conf ├── web/ # 前端构建输出 ├── go.mod ├── go.sum ├── Makefile └── README.md

8.2 前端 (cloudprobe-web)

cloudprobe-web/ ├── src/ │ ├── api/ # API接口封装 │ │ ├── client.ts │ │ ├── auth.ts │ │ ├── server.ts │ │ ├── metric.ts │ │ └── alert.ts │ ├── views/ # 页面视图 │ │ ├── LoginView.vue │ │ ├── DashboardView.vue │ │ ├── ServerListView.vue │ │ ├── ServerDetailView.vue │ │ ├── AlertRulesView.vue │ │ ├── NotificationView.vue │ │ ├── SettingsView.vue │ │ └── SSHView.vue │ ├── components/ # 通用组件 │ │ ├── ServerCard.vue │ │ ├── MetricChart.vue │ │ ├── StatusBadge.vue │ │ ├── AlertForm.vue │ │ └── Terminal.vue │ ├── stores/ # Pinia状态管理 │ │ ├── auth.ts │ │ ├── server.ts │ │ └── metric.ts │ ├── router/ # 路由配置 │ │ └── index.ts │ ├── types/ # TypeScript类型定义 │ │ └── index.ts │ ├── utils/ # 工具函数 │ │ └── format.ts │ ├── App.vue │ └── main.ts ├── public/ ├── index.html ├── vite.config.ts ├── tsconfig.json ├── tailwind.config.js └── package.json

8.3 Agent (cloudprobe-agent)

cloudprobe-agent/ ├── cmd/ │ └── agent/ │ └── main.go ├── internal/ │ ├── collector/ # 指标采集器 │ │ ├── cpu.go │ │ ├── memory.go │ │ ├── disk.go │ │ ├── network.go │ │ └── system.go │ ├── reporter/ # 数据上报 │ │ ├── grpc_reporter.go │ │ └── ws_reporter.go │ ├── config/ # 配置 │ │ └── config.go │ └── command/ # 命令执行 │ └── executor.go ├── pkg/ │ └── utils.go ├── go.mod ├── go.sum ├── Makefile └── README.md

9. 关键模块设计

9.1 告警引擎

flowchart TD
    A["Agent 上报数据"] --> B{"数据类型?"}
    B -->|Metrics| C["写入时序数据库"]
    B -->|Heartbeat| D["更新在线状态"]
    C --> E["触发告警检查"]
    D --> F{"超过60s未上报?"}
    F -->|是| G["触发离线告警"]
    F -->|否| H["状态正常"]
    E --> I{"超过阈值?"}
    I -->|是| J["创建Alert记录"]
    I -->|否| K["检查是否需要恢复通知"]
    J --> L["1分钟后发送首次通知"]
    L --> M{"5分钟后仍未恢复?"}
    M -->|是| N["发送升级通知"]
    M -->|恢复| O["发送恢复通知"]

9.2 通知网关

// notify/notifier.go
package notify

type Notifier interface {
    Send(ctx context.Context, msg *Message) error
    Validate() error
}

type Message struct {
    Title       string
    Content     string
    ServerName  string
    AlertType   string
    Severity    string  // info / warning / critical
    Timestamp   time.Time
}

// 工厂模式创建对应通知器
func NewNotifier(channel string, config json.RawMessage) (Notifier, error) {
    switch channel {
    case "wechat":
        return NewWechatNotifier(config)
    case "qq":
        return NewQQNotifier(config)
    case "email":
        return NewEmailNotifier(config)
    case "feishu":
        return NewFeishuNotifier(config)
    case "telegram":
        return NewTelegramNotifier(config)
    default:
        return nil, fmt.Errorf("unknown channel: %s", channel)
    }
}

9.3 Agent 采集器

// internal/collector/collector.go
package collector

type Collector interface {
    Collect() (interface{}, error)
    Name() string
}

type Manager struct {
    collectors []Collector
    interval   time.Duration
    reporter   reporter.Reporter
}

func (m *Manager) Start(ctx context.Context) {
    ticker := time.NewTicker(m.interval)
    defer ticker.Stop()

    for {
        select {
        case <-ticker.C:
            m.collectAndReport(ctx)
        case <-ctx.Done():
            return
        }
    }
}

func (m *Manager) collectAndReport(ctx context.Context) {
    metrics := &Metrics{}
    
    for _, c := range m.collectors {
        data, err := c.Collect()
        if err != nil {
            log.Warn("collect %s failed: %v", c.Name(), err)
            continue
        }
        metrics.Set(c.Name(), data)
    }
    
    if err := m.reporter.Report(ctx, metrics); err != nil {
        log.Error("report metrics failed: %v", err)
    }
}

9.4 WebSSH 实现

// internal/ws/ssh_handler.go
package ws

import (
    "github.com/gorilla/websocket"
    "golang.org/x/crypto/ssh"
)

type SSHHandler struct {
    upgrader websocket.Upgrader
}

func (h *SSHHandler) Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    // 1. 升级WebSocket
    conn, err := h.upgrader.Upgrade(w, r, nil)
    if err != nil { return }
    defer conn.Close()
    
    // 2. 获取服务器SSH配置
    serverID := r.URL.Query().Get("server_id")
    sshConfig := getSSHConfig(serverID)
    
    // 3. 建立SSH连接
    client, err := ssh.Dial("tcp", sshConfig.Addr, &ssh.ClientConfig{...})
    if err != nil { return }
    defer client.Close()
    
    // 4. 创建Session和PTY
    session, err := client.NewSession()
    if err != nil { return }
    defer session.Close()
    
    // 5. 双向转发数据
    go h.wsToSSH(conn, session.Stdin)
    go h.sshToWS(session.Stdout, conn)
    
    // 6. 等待断开
    <-r.Context().Done()
}

9.5 数据备份任务

// internal/task/backup_task.go
package task

import (
    "os/exec"
    "time"
)

func (t *BackupTask) Run() {
    // 1. 生成备份文件名
    filename := fmt.Sprintf("cloudprobe_backup_%s.sql.gz", time.Now().Format("20060102_150405"))
    
    // 2. pg_dump 导出数据库
    cmd := exec.Command("pg_dump", "-h", t.dbHost, "-U", t.dbUser, "-d", t.dbName, "|", "gzip")
    output, err := cmd.Output()
    if err != nil { return }
    
    // 3. GPG加密 (可选)
    if t.encryptKey != "" {
        output, err = encryptWithGPG(output, t.encryptKey)
        if err != nil { return }
    }
    
    // 4. 保存本地
    localPath := filepath.Join(t.backupDir, filename)
    os.WriteFile(localPath, output, 0644)
    
    // 5. 清理旧备份
    t.cleanupOldBackups()
    
    // 6. 发送邮件
    if t.emailConfig != nil {
        t.sendBackupEmail(localPath, filename)
    }
}

9.6 3x-ui 代理集成模块

// internal/service/xui_service.go
package service

import (
    "net/http"
    "time"
)

// XUIService 3x-ui API代理服务
type XUIService struct {
    httpClient *http.Client
    baseURL    string
    apiToken   string
}

// Config 3x-ui连接配置（存储在系统设置表中）
type XUIConfig struct {
    PanelURL    string `json:"panel_url"`    // 3x-ui面板地址，如 http://192.168.1.100:2053
    APIToken    string `json:"api_token"`     // Bearer API Token
    BasePath    string `json:"base_path"`    // 3x-ui面板路径前缀，默认 /
    Enabled     bool   `json:"enabled"`
    LastTestAt  time.Time `json:"last_test_at"`
    LastTestOK  bool   `json:"last_test_ok"`
}

// NewXUIService 创建3x-ui代理服务
func NewXUIService(cfg *XUIConfig) *XUIService {
    return &XUIService{
        httpClient: &http.Client{Timeout: 10 * time.Second},
        baseURL:    cfg.PanelURL + cfg.BasePath,
        apiToken:   cfg.APIToken,
    }
}

// doRequest 代理请求到3x-ui，自动附加Bearer Token
func (s *XUIService) doRequest(method, path string, body interface{}) (*http.Response, error) {
    // 构建请求
    req, err := http.NewRequest(method, s.baseURL+path, nil)
    if err != nil { return nil, err }
    
    // 设置认证头
    req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+s.apiToken)
    req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
    
    return s.httpClient.Do(req)
}

// GetInbounds 获取入站列表
func (s *XUIService) GetInbounds() ([]map[string]interface{}, error) {
    resp, err := s.doRequest("GET", "/panel/api/inbounds/list", nil)
    // ... 解析响应
    return inbounds, nil
}

// GetClients 获取客户端列表
func (s *XUIService) GetClients() ([]map[string]interface{}, error) {
    resp, err := s.doRequest("GET", "/panel/api/clients/list", nil)
    // ... 解析响应
    return clients, nil
}

// GetNodes 获取节点列表（含心跳状态）
func (s *XUIService) GetNodes() ([]map[string]interface{}, error) {
    resp, err := s.doRequest("GET", "/panel/api/nodes/list", nil)
    // ... 解析响应
    return nodes, nil
}

// GetXrayStatus 获取Xray运行状态
func (s *XUIService) GetXrayStatus() (map[string]interface{}, error) {
    resp, err := s.doRequest("GET", "/panel/api/server/status", nil)
    // ... 解析响应，包含 xrayRunning、cpu、memory等
    return status, nil
}

// TestConnection 测试3x-ui连接是否正常
func (s *XUIService) TestConnection() error {
    resp, err := s.doRequest("GET", "/panel/api/server/status", nil)
    if err != nil { return err }
    if resp.StatusCode != 200 {
        return fmt.Errorf("3x-ui returned status %d", resp.StatusCode)
    }
    return nil
}

告警联动逻辑

// internal/service/xui_monitor.go
package service

// XUIMonitor 3x-ui状态监控器，定期检查节点和Xray状态
type XUIMonitor struct {
    xuiService *XUIService
    alertSvc   *AlertService
    interval   time.Duration
}

func (m *XUIMonitor) Start(ctx context.Context) {
    ticker := time.NewTicker(m.interval)  // 默认60秒
    defer ticker.Stop()

    for {
        select {
        case <-ticker.C:
            m.check()
        case <-ctx.Done():
            return
        }
    }
}

func (m *XUIMonitor) check() {
    // 1. 检查Xray进程状态
    status, err := m.xuiService.GetXrayStatus()
    if err != nil {
        // 连接失败，触发告警
        m.alertSvc.Trigger("xui_connection_lost", "3x-ui面板连接失败")
        return
    }
    
    if !status["xrayRunning"].(bool) {
        m.alertSvc.Trigger("xray_stopped", "Xray-core进程已停止")
    }
    
    // 2. 检查节点心跳状态
    nodes, _ := m.xuiService.GetNodes()
    for _, node := range nodes {
        if node["offline"].(bool) {
            m.alertSvc.Trigger("xui_node_offline", 
                "3x-ui节点离线: "+node["name"].(string))
        }
    }
}

Docker Compose 部署（含3x-ui）

# docker-compose.yml（完整版，含3x-ui）
version: "3.8"
services:
  dashboard:
    image: cloudprobe/dashboard:latest
    container_name: cloudprobe-dashboard
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
      - "50051:50051"
    environment:
      - CP_DATABASE_URL=postgres://cpuser:cppass@postgres:5432/cloudprobe
      - CP_REDIS_URL=redis:6379
      - CP_MODE=foreign
      - CP_XUI_URL=http://xui:2053     # 3x-ui内网地址
    volumes:
      - ./data:/app/data
    depends_on:
      - postgres
      - redis

  xui:
    image: ghcr.io/mhsanaei/3x-ui:latest
    container_name: cloudprobe-xui
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "2053:2053"   # 3x-ui面板（可选外网访问）
    environment:
      - XUI_DB_TYPE=postgres
      - XUI_DB_DSN=postgres://xui:xuipass@postgres:5432/xui?sslmode=disable
    volumes:
      - ./xui-data:/etc/x-ui
    depends_on:
      - postgres

  postgres:
    image: timescale/timescaledb:latest-pg15
    container_name: cloudprobe-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: pgpass
      POSTGRES_MULTIPLE_DATABASES: cloudprobe,xui
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: cloudprobe-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    container_name: cloudprobe-nginx
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
      - ./ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl
    depends_on:
      - dashboard

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:

参考来源

  1. 哪吒探针官方文档 (nezha.wiki) https://nezha.wiki
  2. Komari GitHub 仓库 https://github.com/komari-monitor/komari
  3. TimescaleDB 官方文档 https://docs.timescale.com
  4. 3x-ui GitHub 仓库 (MHSanaei/3x-ui) https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
